name: scout-build-verify
description: Recon -> build -> deterministic diff gate (a CODE node the harness runs itself) -> independent review. The LLM runs only inside the scoped agent nodes; the gate is pure code. Vars: {{task}}.

nodes.prompt:
ROLE: fast read-only recon.
TASK: {{task}}
SCOPE: only the files relevant to the task.
TERMINAL: emit the two sections and stop; do not propose code.
ACCEPTANCE: end with '## findings' and '## confidence'.
